items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between 1 miles NORTH of Exit 27: I95 NORTH - TRENTON and Exit 30: COTTMAN AVE/RHAWN ST. There is a shoulder closed.
items.formatted: I-95 (Philadelphia County) | Multi-vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between 1 miles NORTH of Exit 27: I95 NORTH - TRENTON and Exit 30: COTTMAN AVE/RHAWN ST. There is a shoulder closed. Estimated Reopen: 7/23/26 - 07:00
